public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as recruiter.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a recruiter still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of recruiter in and around Great House Citadel Circle, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Great House Citadel Circle workable through the obligations of recruiter while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Great House Citadel Circle, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of recruiter visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Rhaz Ashvein can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Rhaz Ashvein can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Rhaz Ashvein carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Great House Citadel Circle: the part of Great House Citadel Circle where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
